search_terms_used: return to running protocol injury systematic review pubmed
return to sport running criteria evidence pubmed
run walk program injury rehabilitation pubmed
graded return to running guidelines pubmed
return to running Achilles tendinopathy pain monitoring pubmed
antigravity treadmill return to running injury pubmed
coverage_notes: Good coverage: 2 scoping reviews (George 2024 BSI criteria, Rambaud 2018 ACL criteria), 1 RCT (Silbernagel 2007 pain-monitored activity), 1 prospective cohort (Pairot de Fontenay 2022 ACL RTR predictors), 4 clinical commentaries/reviews (Hegedus 2021 competitive framework, Silbernagel 2015 Achilles RTS, Vincent 2022 antigravity, Lorenz 2020 sprinting criteria). Covers BSI, ACL, and Achilles RTR protocols, walk-run progressions, criteria-based frameworks, and antigravity treadmill use.

papers.title: Criteria and Guidelines for Returning to Running Following a Tibial Bone Stress Injury: A Scoping Review
papers.notes: Synthesized 50 studies identifying five critical pre-running criteria (bony tenderness resolution, pain-free walking, radiological healing, strength/functional tests, contributing factor identification) and recommended individualized walk-run interval progression.

papers.title: Criteria for Return to Running After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Scoping Review
papers.notes: Analyzed 201 studies finding fewer than 1 in 5 used performance-based criteria for return-to-running decisions; median permitted RTR was 12 postoperative weeks.

papers.title: Continued Sports Activity, Using a Pain-Monitoring Model, During Rehabilitation in Patients with Achilles Tendinopathy: A Randomized Controlled Study
papers.notes: RCT comparing continued pain-monitored tendon-loading activity (running/jumping) vs 6-week rest during rehab; found no significant difference at 12 months, supporting continued activity with pain monitoring.

papers.title: Comprehensive Return to Competitive Distance Running: A Clinical Commentary
papers.notes: Proposed a six-phase training framework for returning injured competitive distance runners to full competition, including tools for psychological readiness assessment and aerobic capacity monitoring.

papers.title: A Proposed Return-to-Sport Program for Patients With Midportion Achilles Tendinopathy: Rationale and Implementation
papers.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic and Sports Physical Therapy
papers.notes: Structured 4-phase return-to-sport framework (symptom management/load reduction, recovery, rebuilding, RTS) for Achilles tendinopathy, emphasizing exercise therapy with at least 3 months before considering alternatives.

papers.title: Reintroduction of Running After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction With a Hamstrings Graft: Can We Predict Short-Term Success?
papers.notes: Evaluated a structured 10-session 2-week running reintroduction program post-ACLR; found IKDC subjective score was the only significant predictor of successful return to running.

papers.title: Role of Antigravity Training in Rehabilitation and Return to Sport After Running Injuries
papers.notes: Reviewed evidence for antigravity treadmill use in running injury rehab; established readiness criterion of pain-free running at >95% body weight support for >30 minutes before transitioning to ground running.

papers.title: Criteria-Based Return to Sprinting Progression Following Lower Extremity Injury
papers.journal: International Journal of Sports Physical Therapy
papers.notes: First published structured 3-stage criteria-based progression specifically for return to sprinting, using objective criteria at each stage gate to reduce reinjury risk.
